summary: Iteration 44: Frontend testing of ReportView and BarristerView pages complete. All requested features are working correctly. ReportView displays coloured header bands matching report types (green for Quick Summary verified), Table of Contents, Case Overview, Grounds Identified, Appeal Viability circle, Deadline Warning, and numbered analysis sections. BarristerView loads with premium barrister brief presentation including Executive Summary, Hearing Strategy Snapshot, Counsel Run-Sheet, Authorities & Precedent Pack, Comparative Sentencing & Relief Pathways table, and Full Options Available Matrix.
critical_code_review_comments: ReportView.jsx (lines 131-168) correctly defines report type configurations with headerBg colors: quick_summary='bg-green-600', full_detailed='bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-900 to-blue-900', extensive_log='bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-900 via-slate-900 to-indigo-900'
ReportView.jsx line 332 applies dynamic header styling: <div className={`${config.headerBg} ${config.headerText} p-5 sm:p-6`}>
ReportView.jsx lines 548-565 conditionally renders Risk Assessment section ONLY for extensive_log report type
ReportView.jsx lines 497-513 shows upgrade prompt ONLY for quick_summary report type

BarristerView.jsx includes comprehensive sections: Executive Summary (line 524), Hearing Strategy Snapshot (line 672), Authorities & Precedent Pack (line 722), Comparative Sentencing & Relief Pathways (line 777), Outcome Options Matrix (line 811)
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing

reportview_header_band.details: GREEN header band displayed for Quick Summary report type - matches landing page sample design

reportview_table_of_contents.details: Table of Contents present with 11 clickable section items

reportview_case_overview.details: Case Overview section displays: Defendant (Demo User), Offence (Homicide), Court (N/A), State (NSW), Documents

reportview_appeal_viability.details: Appeal Viability circle shows 0% with 'URGENT BUILD PROSPECTS' status

reportview_deadline_warning.details: Deadline Warning displayed: 'Notice of Appeal must be filed within 28 days of sentence'

reportview_analysis_sections.details: 11 numbered analysis sections found with proper headings (CASE SNAPSHOT, PRIMARY ISSUES IDENTIFIED, etc.)

reportview_upgrade_prompt.details: Quick Summary upgrade prompt found: 'Want the full analysis?'

barrister_view_summary_box.details: Executive Summary box present with all 6 metrics (Accused, Sentence, Crime/Offence, Grounds of Merit, Case Strength, Court/State)

barrister_view_strategy.details: Hearing Strategy Snapshot present with Lead Ground, Authorities Ready, Orders Sought cards

barrister_view_counsel_runsheet.details: Counsel Run-Sheet present with 4 tactical items

barrister_view_authorities.details: Authorities & Precedent Pack section present with Key Legislative Authorities and Comparable Appeal Outcomes panels

barrister_view_sentencing_table.details: Comparative Sentencing & Relief Pathways table present with Comparable Path A/B/C rows showing Original/Revised sentence and Reduction columns

barrister_view_outcome_matrix.details: Full Options Available Matrix present with 5 options: Conviction quashed, Retrial ordered, Conviction downgraded/substituted, Sentence reduced, Appeal dismissed

barrister_view_export_buttons.details: Export PDF and Export DOCX buttons present and functional

seed_data_creation: Used existing test user embedcheck_1772801403@example.com / Test1234!
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 44 verified ReportView and BarristerView pages. Test credentials: embedcheck_1772801403@example.com / Test1234!. Report URL tested: /cases/case_01a9fa3daa63/reports/rpt_91d0adab572a (Quick Summary type). All key design elements matching user requirements verified working: coloured header bands (green/blue/purple by report type), Table of Contents, Case Overview, Grounds Identified, Appeal Viability gauge, Deadline Warning, numbered analysis sections, upgrade prompt. BarristerView is impressive with Executive Summary, Hearing Strategy Snapshot, Counsel Run-Sheet, Authorities & Precedent Pack, Comparative Sentencing table, and Outcome Options Matrix. Risk Assessment section only appears for extensive_log reports (code line 548).
